blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,354 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 34°F.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
